events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess described field condition. Scenario: progress photos for Heat trace show current checkpoint scope finished for area. Remaining visible work is cleanup, labeling, or follow-on finish work outside checkpoint being scored. Reference NEC 427. Stage rough-complete. No component condition flagged. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since description says checkpoint scope finished, remaining cleanup/labeling/finish outside scored checkpoint. No defects described. So decision pass, risk low, work_stage rough-complete, percent_complete maybe 95? component_conditions empty. findings empty? actions maybe none. rationale: checkpoint scope complete and appears compliant with NEC 427; remaining cleanup/labeling/finish outside scope. references NEC 427. Need include all fields. value 0, sound_source empty? The schema says sound_source: "component or source of the sound, when asked". Not asked, can use empty string. event_time 0, rate 0, order empty list, workable empty list. confidence high maybe 0.9. Ensure valid JSON.
